name: floating-clock
description: Always-on-top floating desktop clock for macOS — multi-file Objective-C NSPanel with three-segment dashboard (LOCAL · ACTIVE MARKETS · NEXT TO OPEN). 7 bundled profiles (Default / Day Trader / Night Owl / Minimalist / Researcher / Watch Party / Auction Watcher) + 17 Quick Style moods (Brutalist / Zen / Retro CRT / Executive / Neon / Hacker / Glacier / Midnight / Featherlight / Industrial / Trading Floor / Scholar / Samba / Borealis / Cinema / Levitation / Studio). 14 major exchanges (NYSE · TSX · B3 · LSE · Euronext · XETRA · SIX · JSE · TSE · HKEX · SSE · KRX · NSE · ASX) covering all populated continents, grouped by region (Americas / Europe / Africa / Asia / Oceania) via iana-prefix detection. Live 5-state session tracking (OPEN · LUNCH · PRE-MARKET · AFTER-HOURS · CLOSED) — amber ◐ dawn + rose ◒ dusk auction signals, gated by SessionSignalWindow (off / 5-60 min, Quick-Style-composable). Rocket-launch T-HH:MM:SS countdown (progressive to T-Nd Hh MMm SSs at ≥24h, every scale ticks seconds). Imminence-aware countdown gradient via Weber-Fechner log scale + HSB hue rotation 120°→0° + 1Hz pulse — UrgencyHorizon (5/15/30/60/120/240 min) and UrgencyFlash (off/subtle/normal/intense) levers, both Quick-Style-composable. Tabulated sections with frosted-glass. Clipboard snapshots with self-documenting UTC-stamped headers. /floating-clock:diagnose slash command + Reveal App in Finder + Copy Time/Active/Next menu utilities. **v1.16 headline: phase-tinted week-bar + offline moon phase + LOCAL layout SSoT**. The iter-229..234 week-progress feature gets significantly richer in v1.16. Each cell in the bar now color-tints by hour-of-day phase (5-7 dawn = warm amber, 7-17 day = LocalTheme foreground, 17-19 dusk = warm rose, 19-5 night = cool blue) — every day-group visually shows the daily light cycle as cells progress. Current-day boundary cell uses fine-grain ◐ half-dot for sub-cell granularity (3-level instead of binary fill). Weekend dim (0.45 alpha) layers on top. Pure-offline moon-phase glyph (🌑🌒🌓🌔🌕🌖🌗🌘) added to LOCAL row via synodic-month math from a known new-moon epoch — no lat/lon, no network. LOCAL becomes a 5-row layout: timestamp (with 10pt symmetric top/bottom margins) / W## ISO week / day-letters / week-bar / dedicated debug-label strip. All 6 LOCAL layout constants extracted to single-source `Sources/segments/LocalLayoutConstants.{h,m}` — editing any updates both LocalSegmentView.layout and Layout.m's height calculation in lockstep. Test harness 4th split (test_local_features.m) keeps the lever-test file under the 1000-LoC guard. Aesthetic surface expanded: 30 color themes (+1 Concrete — chromaless cool gray on charcoal architectural mood, 30th-theme milestone), 17 Quick Styles (+1 Studio — Concrete + sharp + subtle + medium — calm architectural readout), 16 progress-bar glyphs (+2 pies/boxes), 10 corner styles (+2 cushion/chunky), 9 shadow presets (unchanged from v1.14), 9 segment-gap presets (+2 cozy/open), 8 density profiles (+2 tight/roomy), 11 DateFormat presets (+2 weekday_only/monthday). 88 test fixtures total. Sub-0.1% idle CPU, ~224 KB signed binary.
